name: UniMart Sprint 1 — Velocity Reporting
description: US-02: Automated sprint velocity reporting. Queries Supabase for ticket status, calculates velocity metrics, and posts a daily summary to Slack (or email). Triggers every morning at 9 AM.

parameters.text: ⚠️ *UniMart Sprint 1 Alert* — {{ $json.metrics.staleCount }} stale ticket(s) detected. Review the board and unblock within 24 hours per Working Agreements.

setup_instructions: 1. Import this JSON into n8n via Workflows > Import from file.
2. Replace YOUR_PROJECT and YOUR_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY with real values.
3. Create a Slack credential in n8n (oAuth2) for your workspace.
5. Run schema addition below in Supabase to add velocity_snapshots table.
6. Activate the workflow — it will run at 9 AM Mon–Fri automatically.
7. You can also trigger it manually via the Execute Workflow button.
_meta.supabase_extra_table: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.velocity_snapshots (id uuid primary key default uuid_generate_v4(), sprint integer, report_date timestamptz, metrics jsonb, squad_metrics jsonb, created_at timestamptz default now());
